title: Congress puts FAFSA frustration in spotlight: ‘Nothing but a disaster’
shortDescription: Republicans and Democrats agree on at least one thing lately: the Biden administration’s handling of college financial aid this year has been a mess.

title: Trump says he wouldn't sign national abortion ban if he wins White House
shortDescription: Asked Wednesday during a trip to Georgia if he'd sign a federal ban on abortions, Trump said "no." He also said an Arizona abortion law goes too far.

title: Post omits context from GOP lawmaker's Nazi comments | Fact check
shortDescription: Maine state Rep. Laurel Libby was referring to the constitutional rights of neo-Nazi demonstrators in the U.S., not Nazi Germany.

title: OnPolitics: Joe Biden blames Donald Trump for AZ abortion ruling
shortDescription: The president's reelection campaign was quick to condemn the near total ban and point fingers at the former president.

title: Ex-Trump CFO gets five months in jail for perjury
shortDescription: Allen Weisselberg, the former chief financial officer at the Trump Organization, pleaded guilty to lying under oath during Trump's civil fraud trial.

title: President Biden calls on Hamas to accept latest cease-fire deal
shortDescription: President Joe Biden spoke publicly about the latest iteration of a cease-fire deal and called on Hamas to accept the proposal.

title: Mike Gallagher's resignation shrinks GOP majority
shortDescription: Wisconsin Republican Mike Gallagher will official resign from Congress on April 19, shrinking House Republicans' already razor-thin majority.

title: Biden hosts Japan's PM Fumio Kishida: See visit
shortDescription: President Biden welcomed Japanese Prime Minister Fumio Kishida to the White House on Wednesday for a formal state visit.

title: Ohio Democrats exploring options for Joe Biden to make November ballot
shortDescription: Secretary of State Frank LaRose's office told Ohio Democrats that President Joe Biden is at risk of not making the Nov. 5 ballot.

title: Woman who stole, sold Ashley Biden diary sentenced to month in jail
shortDescription: Aimee Harris admitted she stole Ashley Biden's personal diary and sold it to Project Veritas in the final weeks of the 2020 campaign.

title: Ex-Trump CFO Allen Weisselberg gets 5 months' jail time on perjury charge
shortDescription: Allen Weisselberg, former CFO at the Trump Organization, gets 5 months for perjury in Trump's civil fraud trial after previous jail term for tax fraud

title: Read full text of 1864 abortion law upheld by Arizona's Supreme Court
shortDescription: The Arizona Supreme Court ruled Tuesday to uphold a near-total ban on abortions passed in 1864. Read the full text of the law and the court's ruling.

title: Biden calls for ceasefire in Gaza
shortDescription: President Biden called for a ceasefire in Gaza as he condemns the actions of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.

title: 2 AZ Supreme Court justices who banned abortion are up for reelection
shortDescription: Associate Justices Clint Bolick and Kathryn H. King will be on the ballot in November after the two voted to enforce Arizona's 1864 abortion ban.

title: Controversial spying law reignites infighting among House Republicans
shortDescription: A controversial spying law is highlighting tensions in the House GOP as conservatives and members of the intelligence community spar over reforms.

title: Vulnerable Republican senators embrace Donald Trump's abortion position
shortDescription: Amid a tough election year, Republicans are staking out positions on abortion that may be more palatable to the moderate voters they're courting.

title: No evidence Biden agreed to resign if he fails cognitive test | Fact check
shortDescription: There is no evidence Biden "consented" to a cognitive test and agreed to resign if he fails, as the post claims.

title: Biden campaign blames Trump after Arizona abortion ruling
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's campaign and the White House worked to blame Donald Trump after the Arizona Supreme Court upheld the state's abortion ban.

title: RFK Jr. campaign consultant says beating Biden is top priority in 2024
shortDescription: Rita Palma, a New York state campaign consultant for RFK Jr., appears in a video clip describing her strategy to beat Biden and possibly elect Trump.

title: 'Antisemitic tropes': Jewish groups criticize Donald Trump's comments
shortDescription: Donald Trump said Jewish voters who support Joe Biden this fall “should be spoken to” and accused Jewish and Black voters of backing Democrats “by habit.”
